## Summary
- [ ] Describe what changed in 2-5 bullet points

## Why
- [ ] Explain the problem solved or improvement delivered

## Scope and impact
- [ ] Runtime impact (CLI/Bot/OAuth/Reconcile):
- [ ] Backward compatibility notes:
- [ ] Security/privacy notes:

## Tests
- [ ] Commands executed locally (copy/paste)
- [ ] Relevant output snippets or screenshots if useful

## Operational notes
- [ ] Required env/config changes (if any)
- [ ] Docs updated (README/docs) or N/A

---
### Solo-maintainer checklist
- [ ] Change is intentionally small and focused
- [ ] Rollback path is clear
- [ ] I can explain this change in under 2 minutes
